mapper.sql: SELECT grid_code, city, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time FROM jw_grid_score
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} ORDER BY site_score DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jw_grid_score WHERE city = #{city}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_score WHERE grid_code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_score ( grid_code, city, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.city}, #{item.positiveDistance}, #{item.negativeDistance}, #{item.siteScore}, sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_grid_score ( grid_code, city, positive_distance, negative_distance, site_score, create_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{city}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{siteScore}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE city = VALUES(city), positive_distance = VALUES(positive_distance), negative_distance = VALUES(negative_distance), site_score = VALUES(site_score)
